name: Toolbox for Figma
description: Toolbox for Figma — Figma plugin with bulk actions, content generation, and workflow utilities for designers.

seo.title: Toolbox for Figma — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Toolbox for Figma: Toolbox for Figma — Figma plugin with bulk actions, content generation, and workflow utilities for designers.

when_to_use: Bulk renaming layers across a large Figma design system
Content generation for placeholder data in Figma mockups
Batch style updates across multiple Figma artboards at once
Workflow utilities for design system maintenance in Figma
Speeding up repetitive Figma tasks with plugin automation

pros: Bulk operations save hours in large files
Handy utilities Figma hasn't shipped natively
cons: Feature breadth means shallow in each area
UX inside the plugin panel feels cramped
Dependent on Figma's plugin API changes
review.verdict: Useful grab-bag of Figma utilities — worth installing, but specialized plugins usually beat it on any single task.
review.best_for: Designers who want a general-purpose Figma power-up without installing ten separate plugins
review.not_for: Designers who already use specialized bulk-action or content plugins
